Home / Services / Roof Cleaning

Roof Cleaning

Extend the life of your roof with our professional roof cleaning service.

A dirty roof not only detracts from your home's appearance but can also cause significant damage over time. Moss, algae, and lichen trap moisture, leading to wood rot and premature shingle deterioration. Our roof cleaning service removes these harmful growths, protecting your roof and extending its lifespan. We use a gentle, non-abrasive cleaning method that won't damage your shingles or tiles. Our team is experienced in cleaning all types of roofs, including asphalt shingles, cedar shakes, and tile roofs. We take extra precautions to protect your landscaping and ensure that all debris is properly disposed of. Investing in regular roof cleaning is a smart way to protect your investment and avoid costly repairs down the road. We understand the unique challenges posed by Portland's climate and are equipped to handle even the toughest roof cleaning jobs.

Our Process

  1. 01 Inspection: We assess your roof's condition and identify areas of concern.
  2. 02 Treatment: We apply a specialized cleaning solution to kill moss, algae, and lichen.
  3. 03 Removal: We gently remove dead debris without causing damage to your roof.
  4. 04 Prevention: We offer preventative treatments to inhibit future growth.

Benefits

  • Removes moss, algae, and lichen
  • Extends roof lifespan
  • Prevents wood rot
  • Enhances curb appeal

Frequently Asked Questions

Will roof cleaning damage my shingles?

No, we use a gentle, non-abrasive cleaning method that won't damage your shingles or tiles.

How often should I have my roof cleaned?

We recommend having your roof cleaned every 2-3 years, depending on the level of moss and algae growth.

Is your roof cleaning solution safe for my landscaping?

Yes, we take precautions to protect your landscaping and use environmentally responsible cleaning solutions.

Get a Free Estimate
